LanguageData.VEE_AbandonedFarmland.description: This region contains ancient farms that were abandoned long ago due to the presence of droughts.
LanguageData.VEE_AbandonedFarmland.label: abandoned farmland
LanguageData.VEE_AbundantPredators.description: Animals considered predators appear in greater numbers here.
LanguageData.VEE_AbundantPredators.label: abundant predators
LanguageData.VEE_AbundantPrey.description: Animals considered prey appear in greater numbers here.
LanguageData.VEE_AbundantPrey.label: abundant prey
LanguageData.VEE_AggressiveHerds.description: Animals in this region have increased manhunter on damage chances.
LanguageData.VEE_AggressiveHerds.label: aggressive herds
LanguageData.VEE_AlluvialFan.description: A broad, fan-shaped spread of rich sediment deposited where flowing water from a river slows and disperses across the land.
LanguageData.VEE_AlluvialFan.label: aluvial fan
LanguageData.VEE_Alphabeavers.description: Alphabeavers have been spotted in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_Alphabeavers.label: alphabeavers
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaFauna.description: The placid environment of the anima forest attracts some anima-touched animals.
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaFauna.label: anima fauna
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaFlora.description: This region contains a dense forest with anima trees and lesser anima growths, quietly resonating with psychic energy. The air feels attentive, as if the land itself is listening.
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaFlora.label: anima flora
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaSoils.description: This area contains soil infused with latent anima energy, subtly influencing plants, animals, and minds.
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaSoils.label: anima soils
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaSoils_Coast.description: This area contains soil infused with latent anima energy, subtly influencing plants, animals, and minds.
LanguageData.VEE_AnimaSoils_Coast.label: anima soils
LanguageData.VEE_AuburnTree_Birches.description: In this forested area many trees remain locked in shades of red and gold, as if autumn never fully passes.
LanguageData.VEE_AuburnTree_Birches.label: auburn birches
LanguageData.VEE_AuburnTree_Maples.description: In this forested area many trees remain locked in shades of red and gold, as if autumn never fully passes.
LanguageData.VEE_AuburnTree_Maples.label: auburn maples
LanguageData.VEE_AuburnTree_Oaks.description: In this forested area many trees remain locked in shades of red and gold, as if autumn never fully passes.
LanguageData.VEE_AuburnTree_Oaks.label: auburn oaks
LanguageData.VEE_AuburnTree_Poplars.description: In this forested area many trees remain locked in shades of red and gold, as if autumn never fully passes.
LanguageData.VEE_AuburnTree_Poplars.label: auburn poplars
LanguageData.VEE_BasaltCape.description: A jutting headland of dark basalt, fractured into sharp columns by ancient lava flows. Rich in volcanic rocks.
LanguageData.VEE_BasaltCape.label: basalt cape
LanguageData.VEE_Blooming_Buttercup.description: This area can grow a large number of colorful wild buttercups.
LanguageData.VEE_Blooming_Buttercup.label: blooming buttercups
LanguageData.VEE_Blooming_ForgetMeNot.description: This area can grow a large number of colorful wild forget-me-nots.
LanguageData.VEE_Blooming_ForgetMeNot.label: blooming forget-me-nots
LanguageData.VEE_Blooming_Knapweed.description: This area can grow a large number of colorful wild knapweed.
LanguageData.VEE_Blooming_Knapweed.label: blooming knapweed
LanguageData.VEE_Blooming_Loosestrife.description: This area can grow a large number of colorful wild loosestrife.
LanguageData.VEE_Blooming_Loosestrife.label: blooming loosestrife
LanguageData.VEE_BombardedSurface.description: This region was subject to orbital or artillery bombardment in a past long gone, and the craters from that bombardment are still present.
LanguageData.VEE_BombardedSurface.label: bombarded surface
LanguageData.VEE_BurnedForest.description: A forested area that has been recently affected by a severe wildfire.
LanguageData.VEE_BurnedForest.label: burned forest
LanguageData.VEE_Cactus_Barrel.description: This area can grow a large number of wild barrel cacti.
LanguageData.VEE_Cactus_Barrel.label: barrel cacti
LanguageData.VEE_Cactus_Beavertail.description: This area can grow a large number of wild beavertail cacti.
LanguageData.VEE_Cactus_Beavertail.label: beavertail cacti
LanguageData.VEE_Cactus_Hedgehog.description: This area can grow a large number of wild hedgehog cacti.
LanguageData.VEE_Cactus_Hedgehog.label: hedgehog cacti
LanguageData.VEE_Cactus_OrganPipe.description: This area can grow a large number of wild organ pipe cacti.
LanguageData.VEE_Cactus_OrganPipe.label: organ pipe cacti
LanguageData.VEE_CalmBasin.description: A wide, shallow crater filled with fine, undisturbed sand. Shielded from the wind by its sloped rim, the basin remains eerily still.
LanguageData.VEE_CalmBasin.label: calm basin
LanguageData.VEE_Cenotes.description: A scattered network of deep, water-filled sinkholes formed by collapsed stone.
LanguageData.VEE_Cenotes.label: cenotes
LanguageData.VEE_ColossalFauna.description: All fauna in this area is much larger than usual.
LanguageData.VEE_ColossalFauna.label: colossal fauna
LanguageData.VEE_ContaminatedCoast.description: A stretch of shoreline where irradiated waters lap against the land, poisoning the shallows and disrupting all nearby life.
LanguageData.VEE_ContaminatedCoast.label: contaminated coast
LanguageData.VEE_ContaminatedReservoir.description: A stagnant body of water saturated with lingering radiation, its depths unsafe for drinking or fishing and its shores hostile to life.
LanguageData.VEE_ContaminatedReservoir.label: contaminated reservoir
LanguageData.VEE_ContaminatedRiver.description: A flowing waterway tainted by lingering radiation, spreading contamination downstream and rendering its waters unsafe for use.
LanguageData.VEE_ContaminatedRiver.label: contaminated river
LanguageData.VEE_CoralReef.description: A large atoll separated from the shore with a ring of corals growing around it.
LanguageData.VEE_CoralReef.label: coral reef
LanguageData.VEE_CraterLake.description: A vast ring of rocky walls encircles a serene, deep-blue lake.
LanguageData.VEE_CraterLake.label: crater lake
LanguageData.VEE_DeadlifeVents.description: Sinister geysers that exhale eerie, ash-like dust—capable of reawakening the dead under its haunting influence.
LanguageData.VEE_DeadlifeVents.label: deadlife geysers
LanguageData.VEE_DeepOreDevoid.description: This area is so poor in deep ores that they are almost non-existant.
LanguageData.VEE_DeepOreDevoid.label: no deep ores
LanguageData.VEE_DeepOrePoor.description: This area is poor in deep ores, decreasing the yield of deep drills by 25%.
LanguageData.VEE_DeepOrePoor.label: deep ore poor
LanguageData.VEE_DeepOreRich.description: This area is rich in deep ores, increasing the yield of deep drills by 25%.
LanguageData.VEE_DeepOreRich.label: deep ore rich
LanguageData.VEE_DeepSnow.description: This region is covered in heavy, compacted layers of snow that resist movement and muffle sound.
LanguageData.VEE_DeepSnow.label: solid snow
LanguageData.VEE_DetachedIceberg.description: A floating mass of ice, detached from the larger ice sheet and quite distant from the shore.
LanguageData.VEE_DetachedIceberg.label: detached iceberg
LanguageData.VEE_DistressedWildlife.description: All animals in this region have increased wildness.
LanguageData.VEE_DistressedWildlife.label: distressed wildlife
LanguageData.VEE_DomesticatedEscapees.description: Farm animals like chickens, pigs, and cows will appear in the wild in small herds, remnants of lost settlements or farms.
LanguageData.VEE_DomesticatedEscapees.label: domesticated escapees
LanguageData.VEE_DriftwoodShore.description: A stretch of coastline littered with bleached logs and broken timber, deposited by tides and storms from distant shores.
LanguageData.VEE_DriftwoodShore.label: driftwood
LanguageData.VEE_DryRiver.description: A section of this river that has dried up, presumably due to absence of precipitation up-river.
LanguageData.VEE_DryRiver.label: dry river
LanguageData.VEE_DustBowl.description: A sun-scorched wasteland choked with dust and dry winds. Vegetation is nearly gone, and relentless sandstorms make survival harsh and unforgiving.
LanguageData.VEE_DustBowl.label: dust bowl
LanguageData.VEE_DustStorms.description: Dust storms that impede vision are much stronger in this area.
LanguageData.VEE_DustStorms.label: dust storms
LanguageData.VEE_EasyToTraverse.description: Certain geographical features in this region make it easier to traverse.
LanguageData.VEE_EasyToTraverse.label: easy to traverse
LanguageData.VEE_EltexDeposits.description: This area has deposits of psychically active eltex.
LanguageData.VEE_EltexDeposits.label: eltex deposits
LanguageData.VEE_FeralKinship.description: All animals in this region have a decreased wildness.
LanguageData.VEE_FeralKinship.label: feral kinship
LanguageData.VEE_FertileRains.description: This region is subject to unusually nutrient-rich rainfall, boosting plant growth for its duration.
LanguageData.VEE_FertileRains.label: fertile rains
LanguageData.VEE_Fertility_Reduced.description: This area contains no fertile soils.
LanguageData.VEE_Fertility_Reduced.label: decreased soil fertility
LanguageData.VEE_FirewoodTrees.description: This region is rich in firewood trees, adapted to fertile volcanic terrain.
LanguageData.VEE_FirewoodTrees.label: firewood trees
LanguageData.VEE_FleshPits.description: A scattered network of anomalous cave entrances, leading to a subterranean realm of pulsating flesh and grotesque abominations.
LanguageData.VEE_FleshPits.label: flesh pits
LanguageData.VEE_FloodPlains.description: A low-lying stretch of land shaped by seasonal flooding, where nutrient-rich waters periodically spill over the banks and retreat, leaving fertile soil in their wake.
LanguageData.VEE_FloodPlains.label: flood plains
LanguageData.VEE_FrequentAuroras.description: Auroras happen much more often in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_FrequentAuroras.label: frequent auroras
LanguageData.VEE_GeomagneticStorm.description: An intense geomagnetic event blankets the region, completely disabling all electrical devices.
LanguageData.VEE_GeomagneticStorm.label: geomagnetic storm
LanguageData.VEE_GlacialMoraine.description: Long ridges of rock and sediment left behind by retreating ice. The ground is uneven and unstable, full of ponds of melted glacial water.
LanguageData.VEE_GlacialMoraine.label: glacial moraine
LanguageData.VEE_GravelBeach.description: A harsh shoreline of loose gravel and rounded stones, where waves grind rock against rock.
LanguageData.VEE_GravelBeach.label: gravel beach
LanguageData.VEE_HardToTraverse.description: Certain geographical features in this region make it harder to traverse.
LanguageData.VEE_HardToTraverse.label: hard to traverse
LanguageData.VEE_IceAndFire.description: A floating mass of ice, with an active lava lake inside. It doesn't get more metal than this.
LanguageData.VEE_IceAndFire.label: ice and fire
LanguageData.VEE_IceSpires.description: Tall, narrow columns of ice rise from the frozen ground, shaped by wind and extreme cold.
LanguageData.VEE_IceSpires.label: ice spires
LanguageData.VEE_IncreasedDiseases.description: Diseases are 25% more common in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_IncreasedDiseases.label: increased diseases
LanguageData.VEE_IncreasedInfestations.description: Insectoid infestations are more common in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_IncreasedInfestations.label: increased infestations
LanguageData.VEE_JadeChunks.description: This area contains small deposits of jadeite.
LanguageData.VEE_JadeChunks.label: jadeite chunks
LanguageData.VEE_JadeiteMountains.description: The stone found in this region is a jade rich mineral.
LanguageData.VEE_JadeiteMountains.label: jadeite mountains
LanguageData.VEE_JaggedRocks.description: Thin rock ridges criss cross this region.
LanguageData.VEE_JaggedRocks.label: jagged rocks
LanguageData.VEE_LargeRiverBanks.description: The river present in this region has larger banks.
LanguageData.VEE_LargeRiverBanks.label: large river banks
LanguageData.VEE_LargerRegion.description: This region is 30% larger than usual.
LanguageData.VEE_LargerRegion.label: larger region
LanguageData.VEE_LaurelForest.description: A dense evergreen forest thriving in mild temperatures and constant humidity. Broad-leaved trees trap moisture from passing clouds, keeping the ground shaded and damp year-round.
LanguageData.VEE_LaurelForest.label: laurel forest
LanguageData.VEE_LessSolarPower.description: Insolation is weaker in this area, reducing the output of solar power by 25%.
LanguageData.VEE_LessSolarPower.label: reduced solar exposure
LanguageData.VEE_LittoralDunes.description: A band of fertile, wind-shaped dunes running along the shoreline, built from sand pulled inland from the sea.
LanguageData.VEE_LittoralDunes.label: littoral dunes
LanguageData.VEE_LoneIsland.description: A large island separated from the shore.
LanguageData.VEE_LoneIsland.label: detached coastal island
LanguageData.VEE_LoneIslandWithLake.description: A large island separated from the shore with a freshwater lake inside it.
LanguageData.VEE_LoneIslandWithLake.label: central lake island
LanguageData.VEE_LoneIslandWithMountain.description: A large island separated from the shore with a tall peak in its center.
LanguageData.VEE_LoneIslandWithMountain.label: resurgent island
LanguageData.VEE_LushLavaFields.description: Ancient lava flows broken by cracks and cooled rock now support dense vegetation. Heat lingers beneath the surface, creating a strange landscape where living growth spreads across black stone.
LanguageData.VEE_LushLavaFields.label: lush lava fields
LanguageData.VEE_MangroveTerrain.description: Large interconnected backish water pools dominate the area.
LanguageData.VEE_MangroveTerrain.label: coastal wetland
LanguageData.VEE_MangroveTrees.description: This area is filled with large amounts of mangrove trees whose roots can thrive in brackish water.
LanguageData.VEE_MangroveTrees.label: mangrove trees
LanguageData.VEE_MarineSanctuary.description: Coastal animals appear in greater numbers here.
LanguageData.VEE_MarineSanctuary.label: marine sanctuary
LanguageData.VEE_MechanoidShipChunks.description: Chunks of a crashed mechanoid ship are found around this region.
LanguageData.VEE_MechanoidShipChunks.label: mechanoid chunks
LanguageData.VEE_Megafauna.description: This region has an abundance of megafauna, brought back to life by genetic engineering.
LanguageData.VEE_Megafauna.label: abundant megafauna
LanguageData.VEE_MeteorCrater.description: A vast impact site with jagged rocky edges and a debris-littered basin.
LanguageData.VEE_MeteorCrater.label: meteor crater
LanguageData.VEE_Microfauna.description: All fauna in this area is much smaller than usual.
LanguageData.VEE_Microfauna.label: microfauna
LanguageData.VEE_MigratoryHerds.description: Groups of herd animals will periodically cross this region.
LanguageData.VEE_MigratoryHerds.label: migratory herds
LanguageData.VEE_MineableComponentSpacer.description: This area has deposits of advanced ancient machinery, which can be mined for advanced components.
LanguageData.VEE_MineableComponentSpacer.label: advanced component deposits
LanguageData.VEE_MineralDevoid.label: mineral devoid
LanguageData.VEE_Moor.description: An open, windswept landscape of low shrubs and grasses growing over waterlogged soil. The ground is peaty and uneven, shaped by constant exposure and poor drainage.
LanguageData.VEE_Moor.label: moor
LanguageData.VEE_MoorFlora.description: This region is rich in low, hardy shrubs and grasses mingled with twisted, gnarled pines, all adapted to acidic, waterlogged soil and constant wind.
LanguageData.VEE_MoorFlora.label: moor plants
LanguageData.VEE_MoreSolarPower.description: Insolation is stronger in this area, increasing the output of solar power by 25%.
LanguageData.VEE_MoreSolarPower.label: increased solar exposure
LanguageData.VEE_Mossy.description: This area contains large patches of mossy soil.
LanguageData.VEE_Mossy.label: mossy
LanguageData.VEE_Mycelium.description: A variety of light-resistant mushrooms similar to the ones growing in glowforests are common in this area.
LanguageData.VEE_Mycelium.label: mycelium
LanguageData.VEE_NaturalAerie.description: Flying animals appear in greater numbers here.
LanguageData.VEE_NaturalAerie.label: natural aerie
LanguageData.VEE_NobleSteeds.description: Horses and Donkeys will appear in this area.
LanguageData.VEE_NobleSteeds.label: noble steeds
LanguageData.VEE_NocturnalFauna.description: Nocturnal and crepuscular animals appear in greater numbers here.
LanguageData.VEE_NocturnalFauna.label: nocturnal fauna
LanguageData.VEE_NoDiseases.description: Diseases very rarely strike in this region, making them almost a nonexistent threat.
LanguageData.VEE_NoDiseases.label: no diseases
LanguageData.VEE_NoTrees.description: Trees of any kind do not grow here naturally.
LanguageData.VEE_NoTrees.label: lack of trees
LanguageData.VEE_NoWind.description: Winds are virtually absent in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_NoWind.label: no wind
LanguageData.VEE_ObsidianChunks.description: This area contains small chunks of obsidian.
LanguageData.VEE_ObsidianChunks.label: obsidian chunks
LanguageData.VEE_PebbleDunes.description: Low dunes of rounded pebbles shaped by constant wind and shifting ground.
LanguageData.VEE_PebbleDunes.label: pebble dunes
LanguageData.VEE_PermafrostBasin.description: A shallow basin where the ground remains permanently frozen beneath a thin surface thaw.
LanguageData.VEE_PermafrostBasin.label: permafrost basin
LanguageData.VEE_PlantLife_Decimated.description: Plant life is extremely scarce here.
LanguageData.VEE_PlantLife_Decimated.label: decimated
LanguageData.VEE_PlantLife_Overgrown.description: Plant life is extremely more abundant here.
LanguageData.VEE_PlantLife_Overgrown.label: overgrown
LanguageData.VEE_PlentifulGrass.description: Grass is very common in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_PlentifulGrass.label: plentiful grass
LanguageData.VEE_PoisonousFlora.description: Harvesting any flora in this area will cause toxic buildup. Crops planted by colonists won't be affected.
LanguageData.VEE_PoisonousFlora.label: poisonous flora
LanguageData.VEE_QuicksandDunes.description: A barren expanse of sand and shallow quicksand that impedes movement. This area is extremely inhospitable.
LanguageData.VEE_QuicksandDunes.label: quicksand dunes
LanguageData.VEE_QuicksandPits.description: This region contains pools of shallow quicksand that impede movement.
LanguageData.VEE_QuicksandPits.label: quicksand pits
LanguageData.VEE_RagingWind.description: Winds are extraordinarily stronger in this area.
LanguageData.VEE_RagingWind.label: raging winds
LanguageData.VEE_RedDesert.description: A vast desert of iron-rich sand, stained red by the slow grinding of ancient stone.
LanguageData.VEE_RedDesert.label: red desert
LanguageData.VEE_RedDesertPlants.description: This region contains some cacti adapted to the red sands.
LanguageData.VEE_RedDesertPlants.label: red desert cacti
LanguageData.VEE_ReducedDiseases.description: Diseases are 25% less common in this region.
LanguageData.VEE_ReducedDiseases.label: reduced diseases
LanguageData.VEE_ReducedPredators.description: Animals considered predators appear in lesser numbers here.
LanguageData.VEE_ReducedPredators.label: reduced predators
LanguageData.VEE_ReducedPrey.description: Animals considered prey appear in lesser numbers here.
LanguageData.VEE_ReducedPrey.label: reduced prey
LanguageData.VEE_RelictDelta.description: A fan of dried channels and silt deposits, shaped by a river that once split and flowed here long ago.
LanguageData.VEE_RelictDelta.label: relict delta
LanguageData.VEE_ResurgentCaldera.description: Ancient volcanic collapse zone with steep crater walls, a central rocky dome, and echoes of past eruptions.
LanguageData.VEE_ResurgentCaldera.label: resurgent caldera
LanguageData.VEE_RisingWaters.description: An extremely flat coastal plain where the tides push far inland. Large stretches of land are regularly submerged.
LanguageData.VEE_RisingWaters.label: rising waters
LanguageData.VEE_RockRidge.description: A rock ridge separating this region in two.
LanguageData.VEE_RockRidge.label: rock ridge
LanguageData.VEE_RodentPlagues.description: This area is infested with rats.
LanguageData.VEE_RodentPlagues.label: rodent plagues
LanguageData.VEE_RotstinkVents.description: Foul geysers that intermittently belch clouds of corpse-born miasma, choking the air with the stench of decay.
LanguageData.VEE_RotstinkVents.label: rotstink geysers
LanguageData.VEE_RottenStench.description: Acrid vapors seep from the ground, blanketing the area in a foul smell that burns the lungs and sours the mood.
LanguageData.VEE_RottenStench.label: rotten stench
LanguageData.VEE_SaltPlains.description: The dried surface of an inland ocean. Sterile and hard to traverse.
LanguageData.VEE_SaltPlains.label: salt plains
LanguageData.VEE_Sandstorms.description: Sandstorms are much more frequent in this area.
LanguageData.VEE_Sandstorms.label: sandstorms
LanguageData.VEE_SerpentineCanyons.description: Geological movement has caused several deep fissures in this mountain.
LanguageData.VEE_SerpentineCanyons.label: serpentine canyons
LanguageData.VEE_Sinkholes.description: This region contains several collapses in the ground forming deep, unstable pits, often exposing bare rock beneath the surface.
LanguageData.VEE_Sinkholes.label: sinkholes
LanguageData.VEE_SkygazingSpot.description: A serene atmospheric phenomenon encourages colonists to spend more time gazing at the sky. Increases the chance of skygazing and boosts the joy it provides.
LanguageData.VEE_SkygazingSpot.label: skygazing spot
LanguageData.VEE_SmallerRegion.description: This region is 30% smaller than usual.
LanguageData.VEE_SmallerRegion.label: smaller region
LanguageData.VEE_SmokeVents.description: Smoldering fissures that intermittently exhale thick, acrid smoke, reducing visibility and choking the lungs.
LanguageData.VEE_SmokeVents.label: smoke geysers
LanguageData.VEE_StagnantRivulet.description: A slow-moving river where water barely flows, its course clogged with silt and shallow pools.
LanguageData.VEE_StagnantRivulet.label: stagnant rivulet
LanguageData.VEE_SteamGeysers_Decreased.description: Steam geysers are absent from this area.
LanguageData.VEE_SteamGeysers_Decreased.label: no geothermal activity
LanguageData.VEE_StoneForest.description: A strange expanse of towering stone spires and jagged rock formations, rising like gigantic, petrified trees from the ground.
LanguageData.VEE_StoneForest.label: stone forest
LanguageData.VEE_StrongerTides.description: Tides in this region are particularly strong, increasing output of tidal generators by 40%.
LanguageData.VEE_StrongerTides.label: stronger tides
LanguageData.VEE_SulfuricLake.description: A stagnant volcanic lake with a strong, foul sulfuric odor. While the water is very mildly toxic, the surrounding soil is rich in nutrients, supporting hardy, sulfur-tolerant plant life.
LanguageData.VEE_SulfuricLake.label: sulfuric lake
LanguageData.VEE_SulfuricRiver.description: A foul-smelling river carrying acidic, sulfur-laden waters, its banks scorched and inhospitable to most forms of life.
LanguageData.VEE_SulfuricRiver.label: sulfuric river
LanguageData.VEE_TornadoAlley.description: Frequent and intense tornadoes sweep through this region, threatening the colony.
LanguageData.VEE_TornadoAlley.label: tornado alley
LanguageData.VEE_ToxicCrater.description: A blasted ring of stone surrounds a stagnant, foul-smelling pool. The water glows faintly...
LanguageData.VEE_ToxicCrater.label: toxic crater
LanguageData.VEE_ToxicVents.description: Volatile fissures that periodically spew noxious green gas, poisoning the air and sickening anything that breathes it.
LanguageData.VEE_ToxicVents.label: toxic geysers
LanguageData.VEE_TropicalBeach.description: A warm coastal region shaped by steady tides and seasonal storms. Sandy beaches and shallow waters support dense vegetation along the shoreline.
LanguageData.VEE_TropicalBeach.label: tropical beach
LanguageData.VEE_TropicalBeachFlora.description: This region is rich in palm trees, including cocoa trees, screw pines and date palms.
LanguageData.VEE_TropicalBeachFlora.label: tropical beach flora
LanguageData.VEE_UndergroundGasDeposits.description: This region is rich in deep Helixien gas deposits.
LanguageData.VEE_UndergroundGasDeposits.label: underground gas deposits
LanguageData.VEE_VenomousEcosystem.description: Venomous animals appear in greater numbers here.
LanguageData.VEE_VenomousEcosystem.label: venomous ecosystem
LanguageData.VEE_VolcanicRichSoil.description: This area has patches of volcanic soil that have higher than average fertility.
LanguageData.VEE_VolcanicRichSoil.label: rich volcanic soil
LanguageData.VEE_VolcanicSandDesert.description: A barren desert of black volcanic sand, born from long-dead eruptions.
LanguageData.VEE_VolcanicSandDesert.label: volcanic sand desert
LanguageData.VEE_VolcanicSandDesertFlora.description: This region contains some cacti adapted to the volcanic sands, and an absence of grass.
LanguageData.VEE_VolcanicSandDesertFlora.label: volcanic sand flora
LanguageData.VEE_Volcano.description: Charred stone ridges form the rim of an ancient caldera, its heart glowing with molten fury.
LanguageData.VEE_Volcano.label: volcano
LanguageData.VEE_WanderingCompanions.description: Animals are more used to humans in this region, making it easier for colonists to bond with them.
LanguageData.VEE_WanderingCompanions.label: wandering companions
LanguageData.VEE_WastelandFauna.description: Wasteland animals appear in greater numbers here.
LanguageData.VEE_WastelandFauna.label: wasteland fauna
LanguageData.VEE_WildCereals.description: This area can grow a large number of wild cereals.
LanguageData.VEE_WildCereals.label: wild cereals
LanguageData.VEE_WildFruitTrees.description: This area can grow a large number of wild {0}.
LanguageData.VEE_WildFruitTrees.label: wild fruit trees
LanguageData.VEE_WildRice.description: This area can grow a large number of wild {0}.
LanguageData.VEE_WildRice.label: wild rice
LanguageData.VEE_WildSucculents.description: This area can grow a large number of wild {0}.
LanguageData.VEE_WildSucculents.label: wild succulents
LanguageData.VEE_WildWheat.description: This area can grow a large number of wild {0}.
LanguageData.VEE_WildWheat.label: wild wheat
